# AI for Global Finance Industry Lab Manual: Introduction and Business Value

## EdTech (Set D) — Base Track: Sovereign Cockpit (No-Code)

Welcome to the **Base Track** for EdTech in the AI for Global Finance industry. We will build a cutting-edge, no-code React dashboard that seamlessly interacts with our n8n swarm.

## Goal
Develop an efficient and user-friendly interface using **Lovable** (or v0/Cursor) to serve as the front-end connection point for our Session 03 n8n Webhook in EdTech applications.

## Step-by-Step Guide
1. Log into Lovable.dev and create a new project.
2. **Prompt**: "Design a single-page React dashboard that seamlessly interacts with your Session 03 n8n Visual Swarm workflow, serving as the central hub for AI-driven finance analysis and insights."
3. **n8n Link**: Ensure your Session 03 n8n session has an active Webhook node listening on `http://localhost:5678/webhook/swarm`.

*An n8n template `workflow_session_05.json` (just the webhook receiver) is provided.*
